sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78948" key="paratra/gw|dos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρατρᾰ´γῳδ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n78948.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pseudo-tragic, bombastic</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7a</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
